name: Lentils with Spinach (Palak Dal)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lentils well and place in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cover with the water.
3. Meanwhile, if using frozen spinach, remove from the freezer and allow it to begin thawing. If using fresh spinach, wash well and chop finely.
4. Peel the onion and garlic and coarsely slice them. Add to the lentils.
5. Bring to a boil, then add ginger, chili powder, and salt.
6. Simmer gently until the lentils break down into soup.
7. Boil off any excess water so that a thick sauce is made.
8. Add the spinach. If it is not fully thawed by now, continue cooking until the spinach is thawed and mixed in with the lentils.
9. Finally, add yogurt and stir well.
10. Cook for 3 more minutes and serve.
